summary: Contracted agent skills for repeatable AIENG CAD/CAE workflows. These are behavior contracts, not execution tools.
global_safety_rules: Read .aieng package evidence before making CAD/CAE recommendations.
Fail closed when required evidence is missing or stale.
Do not bypass approval gates for CAD/package mutations, mesh generation, solver execution, or result extraction.
Do not advance engineering claims automatically.
Do not present solver/result artifacts as certification or production validation.

skills.title: CAE setup preflight
skills.purpose: Check whether a project has enough package evidence to prepare a solver run review.
required_inputs: CAD evidence: manifest plus topology or feature graph
CAE evidence: material, load, constraint, mapping, mesh/deck status where available
refusal_conditions: No selected project or no .aieng package.
Required material/load/constraint evidence is missing and the user has not supplied it.
Adapter preflight reports missing FreeCADCmd, Gmsh, or CalculiX for the requested workflow.
The user asks to run solver tools before preflight and approval.
skills.verification_scenario: Open a CAD-only project and confirm the skill reports missing CAE setup without proposing solver execution.

skills.title: Design target review
skills.purpose: Compare available result summaries and computed metrics against explicit design targets without advancing claims.
required_inputs: result evidence when reporting numerical comparisons
refusal_conditions: Required design targets are missing and the user has not supplied comparison criteria.
No solver/result evidence exists for requested numerical conclusions.
Evidence is stale and the user asks for a current pass/fail verdict.
The user asks to certify or approve a design from summary artifacts alone.
skills.verification_scenario: Use a package with result_summary.json but no design_targets.yaml and confirm the skill reports no target baseline.

skills.title: CAD modification proposal and verification
skills.purpose: Propose one parameterized CAD change, check protected features and evidence impact, and stop before unsafe mutation.
required_inputs: editable parameter list or explicit user-approved modeling scope
protected region / stable topology context when present
refusal_conditions: No editable parameter or approved modeling scope exists.
The proposed edit touches protected geometry without explicit user approval.
The user asks for multiple geometry changes before verification without accepting attribution loss.
Post-edit regression or critique worsens safety/manufacturability and the user has not accepted that risk.
outputs: One proposed CAD change and rationale.
Expected evidence impact and stale downstream artifacts.
Post-change critique/regression summary when a mutation is approved and performed.
skills.verification_scenario: Use a project with editable parameters and confirm the skill proposes one bounded edit before any mutation.

skills.title: Approval-gated solver run orchestration
skills.purpose: Prepare mesh/deck readiness, request approval-gated solver execution, extract results, and refresh summaries.
required_inputs: FreeCADCmd/Gmsh availability for mesh workflows and CalculiX/ccx availability for solver workflows
refusal_conditions: Structural adapter capability status is blocked for required local tools.
Mesh, solver settings, load case, or input deck evidence is missing.
The user asks to report solver values before solver/result evidence exists.
outputs: Solver/result artifact list when execution succeeds.
skills.verification_scenario: Use a package missing ccx or solver deck evidence and confirm the skill stops at blocked preflight.

skills.title: Evidence report synthesis
skills.purpose: Create a review-ready summary from existing package evidence, limitations, stale state, and claim boundary.
refusal_conditions: The user asks to hide missing or stale evidence.
The user asks to certify the design or advance claims without explicit claim workflow.
skills.verification_scenario: Use a CAD-only package and confirm the report identifies no solver evidence and no automatic claim advancement.
